END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[MaterialCode]
FROM [Recipes] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
ORDER BY [r].[RecipeID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [p].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [e].[EquipmentID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]

LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]
LEFT JOIN [Equipments] AS [e] ON [r].[DefaultEquipmentID] = [e].[EquipmentID]

ORDER BY [r].[StepNumber]

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomID], [u].[UomName]
FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]

WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[BomID]

SELECT [r].[BomID], [r].[RecipeID], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Quantity], [r].[UomID], [r].[WastePercentage], [r].[Note], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomID], [u].[UomName]
FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [r].[UomID] = [u].[UomID]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[BomID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [p].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p].[AreaName], CASE
    WHEN [e].[EquipmentID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]
FROM [RecipeRouting] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialId] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]
LEFT JOIN [Equipments] AS [e] ON [r].[DefaultEquipmentID] = [e].[EquipmentID]

WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[StepNumber]

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], CASE

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomID], [u].[UomName]
FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [r].[UomID] = [u].[UomID]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[BomID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [p].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p].[AreaName], CASE
    WHEN [e].[EquipmentID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]
FROM [RecipeRouting] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialId] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [p].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p].[AreaName], CASE
    WHEN [e].[EquipmentID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]
FROM [RecipeRouting] AS [r]

LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

        SELECT 1
        FROM [Recipes] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], CASE

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]

LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]
LEFT JOIN [Equipments] AS [e] ON [r].[DefaultEquipmentID] = [e].[EquipmentID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p0] ON [e].[AreaId] = [p0].[AreaId]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[StepNumber]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [p].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p].[AreaName], CASE
    WHEN [e].[EquipmentID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [e].[EquipmentID], [e].[EquipmentName], [e].[EquipmentCode], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[AreaId] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[AreaId], [p0].[AreaName], [p0].[AreaCode]
FROM [RecipeRouting] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialId] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p] ON [r].[AreaId] = [p].[AreaId]
LEFT JOIN [Equipments] AS [e] ON [r].[DefaultEquipmentID] = [e].[EquipmentID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionAreas] AS [p0] ON [e].[AreaId] = [p0].[AreaId]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]

    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]

    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]

) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

2026-05-08 00:36:57.635 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@__areaIds_0='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT DISTINCT [r].[AreaId]
FROM [RecipeRouting] AS [r]
INNER JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p] ON [r].[OrderID] = [p].[OrderID]
WHERE [r].[AreaId] IS NOT NULL AND [r].[AreaId] IN (
    SELECT [a].[value]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]

    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE

        ELSE N'N/A'

    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]

    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'

) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]

SELECT [p].[BatchID], [p].[OrderID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[Status], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[CurrentStep], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[RecipeName], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]
FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
ORDER BY [p].[BatchID]
